Initiate Symbol of the Tribunal  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 3
WIS: +1 MANA: +3
Effect: Hammer of Wrath (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: SHM
Race: BAR
Deity: The Tribunal
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Initiate Symbol of the Tribunal
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 3
WIS: +1 MANA: +3
Effect: Hammer of Wrath (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: SHM
Race: BAR
Deity: The Tribunal
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Light:Paw of Opalla
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Jorr
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:15:50
Page Updated:Sun May 7th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 4
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Tribunal Initiate

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Halas


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction

Easy Pet Item
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2004 at 7:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781171842
151 posts
This is an easy quest to summon weapons for dog dog.
▲ Page top
Very nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 7:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758599198
Scholar
29 posts
For a Non-twink character this is a great quest. With the POP expansion I did this in about 20 minutes. Plus it gives you a magical hammer for free that does extra damage to undead(specially nice if you run into the vengful singers). Deffinatly suggest doing this.
Desert Bear
▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# May 25 2003 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770515247
23 posts
If you are not a twink this quest is a must.
It is going to help also when you fight wisps that needs a magic weapon to actually do damages.
If you are a twink disregard.
▲ Page top
No longer NO DROP
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253839770
Scholar
47 posts
The symbol is no longer NO DROP. Also, if you can get a druid to port you to Surefall Glade, then everything gets much easier. Note: Make sure the druid is doing a group port. I just did this quest, and the druid cast a self-only port to SFG, had to gate back to Halas, and recover quite a bit of mana.

Hilimorn
Shaman o' the sixth circle
Friona Vie
▲ Page top
RE: No longer NO DROP
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2002 at 1:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593362161379
43 posts
Pardon me, but you say you are on Firiona Vie Server? Just so you know, the only items that are no drop there are epic items, so of course this item is not no drop. On the other servers it will most likely be no drop. But Trivial Loot Code is in effect throughout the entire server, so you farmers out there, if you come to FV hoping to cash in on no drops, be sure what your farming is at least light blue to you, or else POOF! no magic or lore item.
▲ Page top
#Valdon, Posted: Aug 17 2002 at 11:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nevermind. yet ANOTHER quest I can not do with my TROLL SHAMMY.
RE: troll?
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 4:26 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252108299
Scholar
73 posts
If your a troll shaman of cazic or inny (not sure whether shaman can be agnostic) there is a different quest that you can do.
▲ Page top
RE: troll?
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2003 at 1:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252189688
11 posts
TRL SHM's of Cazic can also do a quest. It is in Paineel. Go to the CLR Temple there and ask around...Initiate of Cazic-Thule and a follow on quest. Oh BTW IKS SHM can also do this series. Just have to build faction. Go to Warrens and start waxin' the Kobolds. Good Luck Cazicites! Fer above all else will conquer all.
▲ Page top
RE: troll?

# May 17 2003 at 5:04 AM Rating: Good

QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 3:59 PM Rating: Default

8 posts

▲ Page top
decent item
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2002 at 9:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361203145
25 posts
This is a pretty good newbie quest item.

I started a shamen a while back, he is only lvl 6 and I just did this quest.

The weapon it summons is 1 damage better than a cracked staff (5/32) so I just sold mine for the 1plat.

Also a good item on rallos zek because its no drop.

I hope they add some upgrades to it, if there arent any in the game yet.
▲ Page top
Lvl 1 EASY
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 8:07 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771933255
View User Forum
4 posts
Listen, it's a peice of cake at lvl one. Everfrost is full of druids, and, you guessed it, shamans. both can cast SoW and buffs if your afraid that you wont make it through BB alive...
turn in the note, get the second note. put all of your stuff in the bank (since your right there anyways), then attack the banker for a -quick- trip home ;)

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 02 2001 at 11:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am a bard of the Tribunal. I moved to Halas at a young age. Why can I not be properly inducted into the religion I chose? There are no special religious items that are usable by all members of certain religons in the game. I have a friend who is a paladin of Erollisi who feels the same way. Religion should have another use besides adjusting faction. Otherwise why dosen't everyone just choose Agnostic? Hmmmm... game depth. That would be nice.
How does it proc?
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2001 at 10:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755498725
42 posts
What does it do when it procs?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 03 2001 at 9:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) DuH! it's Shammy to why you think they have that effect?
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 17 2001 at 2:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i belive the hammer is cleric and paladin ONLY
RE: How does it proc?
QuoteReply
# May 08 2001 at 5:53 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

it is a right click effect , it summons a hammer, just like cleric spell of the same name.
▲ Page top
RE: How does it proc?
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2001 at 6:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Doh! it is a right click effect , it summons a hammer, just like cleric/PALADIN spell of the same name Erdric the Paladin...

And it's a triggered item not a weapon with a process so you simply right click it and it summons your hammer.

Anonymous

▲ Page top
RE: Equip it
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2001 at 6:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755498725
42 posts
But its random isnt it? If you click it, it would be trigered right?
▲ Page top
RE: Equip it
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2001 at 4:55 AM Rating: Excellent
DinkumThinkum
Sage
54 posts

The symbol is something you wear around your neck, not a weapon with a random proc.

The effect summons a Hammer of Wrath, a magic 1-H Blunt weapon, when you right-click on the symbol.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 15 2000 at 3:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why is this the only Tribunal item for barbs? All the others have an increase quest once the basics are completed. Where is there a place to improve this item?
Rallos Zek
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2001 at 5:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757116951
Sage
248 posts
Nobody's posted any updates on the Rallos Zek items either. Doesn't mean they don't exist, it just means somebody has to actually go around talking in complete sentances to NPC instead of reading spoilers. <cough cough>
▲ Page top
RE: Rallos Zek
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 5:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245704661
27 posts
Hehe, don't assume we haven't tried. And Rallos and Tribunal aren't the only ones who've gotten the shaft. I've looked for ages for the upgrade to my second Cazic symbol and asked around, and got a friend who's been tryin' to find the upgrade to the Rallos symbol... That combined with the fact that some dietys don't even have symbol quests implemented yet (prexus, quellious, bristlebane, etc) leads me to believe VI's just being REALLY slow about finishing up this project. HURRY UP VI, I WANT MY SYMBOLS la~

Kaguk Stumpybasher, 30th Disciple of Fear
